maghfirah.d: He forgives all sins for those who return

khaliq.d: Originator of the heavens and the earth

ilm_allah.d: Not a leaf falls but He knows it

qudrah.d: When He decrees: Be — and it is

razzaq.d: Provision is written and sent down

hikmah_allah.d: The Wise in all He decrees

wadud.d: Whom Allah loves, and who love Him

arsh.d: His Kursi extends over the heavens and earth

asma_husna.d: To Him belong the best names

iman.d: Belief that settles in the heart and acts

kufr.d: Covering the truth after it is clear

nifaq.d: Faith on the tongue, denial within

ghayb.d: Trust in what lies beyond perception

qadar.d: Nothing befalls but by His measure

angels.d: Servants of light who do as commanded

jinn.d: A creation of smokeless fire, also accountable

shaytan.d: An open enemy — so take him as an enemy

ayat_signs.d: Signs for a people who reflect

haqq.d: Truth arrives — falsehood is bound to vanish

salah.d: The pillar: standing before Him five times

zakah.d: Purifying wealth by giving its due

sawm.d: Prescribed so that you may attain taqwa

hajj.d: The journey to the first House

dua.d: Call on Me — I will answer

dhikr.d: Hearts find rest in the remembrance of Allah

tawbah.d: The door that never closes before death

sujud.d: The closest a servant comes to his Lord

masjid.d: Houses Allah permitted to be raised

shukr.d: If you are grateful, I will surely increase you

tawakkul.d: Whoever relies on Allah — He is sufficient

amanah.d: Render trusts back to their owners

adl.d: Stand firm for justice, even against yourselves

ihsan.d: Is the reward of excellence anything but excellence?

afw.d: Let them pardon — do you not love that Allah forgive you?

kibr.d: He does not love the arrogant

tawadu.d: The servants of the Merciful walk gently

infaq.d: A grain that grows seven hundredfold

bukhl.d: Whatever you hoard will circle your neck

israf.d: The wasteful are brothers of the devils

birr_walidayn.d: Lower to them the wing of humility

rahm.d: Fear Allah, through whom you ask, and the wombs

honesty_trade.d: Woe to those who give less than due

gheebah.d: Would one of you eat his dead brother's flesh?

hasad.d: From the evil of the envier when he envies

kadhib.d: Those who fabricate lies do not believe

niyyah.d: Seeking only the Face of their Lord

riya.d: Prayer performed to be seen is hollow

qalb.d: The day nothing avails but a sound heart

nafs.d: From the inciting self to the soul at peace

khushu.d: Successful are believers humble in prayer

khawf.d: For one who feared the standing before his Lord

hope.d: Do not despair of the mercy of Allah

hubb.d: He will place affection for the righteous

rida.d: Allah pleased with them, and they with Him

tazkiyah.d: Successful is the one who purifies it

fitrah.d: The disposition upon which He created people

ruh.d: Say: the soul is of the affair of my Lord

hawa.d: Have you seen the one who took desire as his god?

adam.d: The first human, taught the names

nuh.d: 950 years of calling, then the flood

ibrahim.d: The intimate friend who smashed the idols

ismail.d: The patient son of the sacrifice

dawud.d: Mountains and birds echoed his praise

sulayman.d: A kingdom no one after him would have

ayyub.d: The exemplar of patience in affliction

isa.d: A word from Him, cast to Maryam

maryam.d: Chosen above the women of the worlds

muhammad.d: A mercy to all the worlds

shuayb.d: Give full measure, do not cheat

lut.d: The people who transgressed all bounds

minor_prophets.d: Every nation was sent a warner

prophethood.d: One chain of guidance, Adam to Muhammad ﷺ

kahf.d: Three hundred years asleep in Allah's care

dhul_qarnayn.d: Power used for justice, east to west

luqman.d: A father's timeless counsel to his son

firawn.d: This day We preserve your body as a sign

qarun.d: Swallowed by the earth with his treasure

aad_thamud.d: Mighty nations, gone in a scream and a wind

saba.d: Two gardens, then the flood of the dam

yajuj.d: The barrier until the true promise nears

habil.d: The first murder, and the crow's lesson

two_gardens.d: 'I do not think this will ever perish'

seerah_makkah.d: The cave, the plots, the consolation

badr_uhud.d: Victory, wound, and the test of the trench

qiyamah.d: The Day the earth is shaken with its quake

resurrection.d: Who revives bones when they are dust?

hisab.d: Sufficient is your own self today as accountant

mizan.d: An atom's weight of good will be seen

jahannam.d: A warning of the fire whose fuel is men and stones

barzakh.d: A barrier until the Day they are raised

shafaah.d: None intercedes except by His permission

records.d: Read your book — you suffice as your own auditor

creation_universe.d: The heavens and earth were a joined entity

stars.d: By the positions of the stars — a mighty oath

night_day.d: He wraps the night over the day

rain_water.d: We made from water every living thing

wind.d: Winds as pollinators and glad tidings

seas.d: Two seas that meet without mixing

mountains.d: Pegs cast so the earth not shift with you

human_creation.d: From a clinging clot, stage upon stage

animals.d: Do they not look at the camel, how created?

iron.d: We sent down iron, of great might

life_earth.d: So will the dead be brought forth

tasbih_cosmos.d: Nothing exists but glorifies His praise

halal_haram.d: Eat of the good and lawful things

riba.d: Allah destroys interest and grows charity

divorce.d: Retain honorably or release with kindness

modesty.d: Lower the gaze, guard the private parts

qisas.d: In legal retribution is life for you

contracts.d: Write it down — the longest verse

freeing_slaves.d: The steep path: freeing a neck

shahadah.d: Bear witness for Allah, even against kin

food.d: Let man look at his food

jihad.d: Those who strive in Us — We guide them

trial.d: Do people think they will not be tested?

fitnah.d: A trial that strikes beyond the wrongdoers

hijrah.d: The earth of Allah is spacious

nasr.d: If Allah helps you, none can overcome you

persecution.d: Messengers before you were also denied

martyrdom.d: Not dead — alive with their Lord, provided for

peace.d: If they incline to peace, incline to it

weak_oppressed.d: We intend to favor those humbled in the land

insan.d: Created in the finest stature — then tested

weakness.d: Man was created weak and hasty

wealth.d: Wealth and children: adornment, and a test

time.d: By time — man is in loss, except...

ilm.d: Are those who know equal to those who do not?

tongue.d: A good word is like a good tree

travel.d: Travel and see how creation began

dreams.d: Sleep: the lesser death, nightly returned

healing.d: When I fall ill, it is He who heals me

dunya.d: Play, diversion, adornment — then a mirage

akhirah_priority.d: The Hereafter is better and more enduring

blessings.d: Count Allah's favor — you cannot enumerate it

zulm.d: Allah does not wrong; people wrong themselves

ummah.d: The middle nation, witnesses over mankind

brotherhood.d: He joined your hearts — you became brothers

women.d: Whoever does good, male or female, We give life

neighbors.d: The near neighbor and the distant one

obedience_authority.d: Obey — and refer disputes back to Allah

dawah.d: Invite with wisdom and beautiful preaching

jamaah.d: Hold the rope of Allah, all together

hidayah.d: You do not guide whom you love — Allah guides

sirat.d: My path, straight — so follow it

tadabbur.d: Do they not reflect — or are hearts locked?

parables.d: Examples struck for people, that they recall

preservation.d: We revealed it, and We are its Guardian

amal_salih.d: Faith paired with works, always together

iblis_refusal.d: 'I am better than him' — the root of arrogance

kaaba_protection.d: The first House established for mankind

flood.d: Carried on planks and nails, by Our eyes

qana_ah.d: Do not strain your eyes toward what others have
